title: Model ADDED tattoo that wasn't in original
description: Generated image has forearm tattoo on right arm - original photo has no tattoos. Direct violation of identity preservation.
cause: Prompt not strong enough OR model hallucination
testNeeded: Generate same image, verify no tattoos added

title: Lighting changed between original and generated
description: Generated image has different lighting direction/intensity than original, making comparison difficult
cause: Model not preserving lighting despite prompt instructions
testNeeded: Compare lighting consistency across multiple generations

title: No user-facing explanation/citation panel
description: User cannot see WHY the projection was made - citations and reasoning not visible in main UI
cause: Feature not implemented - calculations show in debug but not user-friendly format

title: History doesn't show before/after comparison
description: Generation history only shows output image, not input. Can't compare previous runs easily.
